docket_entries.description: ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE *GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT APPEARED THROUGH COURT CALL. DEFENDANT ORALLY STATED IN COURT THAT HER MAILING ADDRESS HAD CHANGED. CLERK CHANGED THE ADDRESS GIVEN BY DEFENDANT OVER THE PHONE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT LINDA POKSAY'S REQUEST THAT THE COURT ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IN THIS MATTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT POKSAY, LINDA
DEFENDANT LINDA POKSAY APPEARED THROUGH COURT CALL AT TODAY'S HEARING AND INFORMED THE COURT OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OVER THE PHONE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADAKOVIC, ADRIENNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POKSAY, LINDA $325.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00); DOCUMENT STAMPED:"FILED BY FAX" NEXT TO SIGNATURE. SERVED FEB-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POKSAY, LINDA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,560.00 FILED BY RADAKOVIC, ADRIENNE AS TO DEFENDANT POKSAY, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY DEFENDANT POKSAY, LINDA
EXHIBITS RECEIVED FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT POKSAY, LINDA
